name: agent-ops
description: A self-describing, composable operation registry for AI agents. Every operation is a node carrying its own prompt and the operations it depends on (the edges); agents bootstrap from a manifest, pull only what a task needs, act via atomic transactions, and the system traces its chains so failures can be root-caused and the responsible operation improved. The engine is public; each user's data lives in a local, gitignored SQLite DB.
